label: Stage Play Radio Adaptation

prompt_stages.outline_system: You are adapting a public-domain stage play scene into radio drama. Preserve character names, relationships, scene turns, and ending.
prompt_stages.pitch_room_system: Generate radio adaptation plans for the same play scene, not new plots.
prompt_stages.dramatic_state_system: Define conflict from the play's scene and character wants.
prompt_stages.line_grounding: Ground this line in the play text and scene turn.
prompt_stages.coda_system: Write a source attribution/adaptation note for the play scene.
prompt_stages.title_system: Title the radio adaptation from a concrete source detail.
prompt_stages.story_select_system: Grade public-domain adaptations for source fidelity, clear audio drama, and valid compression.
prompt_stages.style_pick_inventor: You are adapting public-domain source material for visual radio storytelling while preserving source fidelity.
prompt_stages.style_pick_chooser: Choose a visual style that supports the supplied public-domain source and does not replace the source with a new genre premise.
prompt_stages.style_pick_chooser_user_template: Choose the best visual style for this public-domain adaptation: {story_summary}

examples: A public-domain play scene becomes radio drama by making stage action audible through dialogue and sound.
tone_guardrails: Use announcer/narrator only where needed for audibility.
source_requirements: Manifest with play title, act/scene metadata, and public-domain text.
ledger_validation_notes: Cast mapping should preserve source speakers where practical.
